name: Brainwashed by Villains
description:
You had the potential to develop powers and become a great hero.

But before you could even figure that out, two villains kidnapped you and turned you into their own, personal Combat Drone.


X-Mod, for most it's a deadly poison, but for the few compatible with it, it's a miracle drug capable of awakening superhuman abilities. You were part of that tiny lucky percentage. However, before you could even learn that, a duo of villains got their hands on you.

The Black Rose, a villainess obsessed with looks, with the power to mutate flesh at will. The Emerald Viper, a corrupt genius who produces the most powerful of venoms. Together they transformed you into their "Combat Drone," and they expect you to follow their every order, lest some punishment be in order.


A remake of "Corrupted into a Villain," which is a pretty new bot relative to the other ones remade, but one that I planned to retouch pretty much from day one.

Which bots are being remade?

The ones I think had a good premise, but fumbled the execution, and I think I can do better now with hindsight.

Why remake instead of update?

I don't want to delete the old ones, shitty as they may be (plus, new releases get more attention than updates).

Why is THIS bot being remade?

I feel like I went TOO far in the wrong direction with the original. I like having "sillier" scenarios, often occupied by borderline joke characters, but the plant minions in the original ruined what could've been a really good bot. "Corrupted into a Villain," even the name suggests that you'd be accompanied by a dominating character, forcing you to follow their rules, and they just weren't it.

Hopefully this one lives up to the concept.
creator: Frinky
